mitigations: Keep the summary behind a kill switch until prerequisites are green.
Use the plan-contract fixtures as the rollout gate for dependency ordering.
Update the operator runbook before broadening exposure.
primary_risk.statement: If the team re-enables the dashboard summary before the rollback follow-up lands, users and support will see the same misordered plan that triggered the incident.
